MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jonathan Vaknin, Esq., 213-298-3001 ext 101, Specially Appearing for PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
No other appearances.

Plaintiff's counsel; submitts to the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Plaintiff's unopposed summary judgment motion is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
